name: Parmesan Beet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except lettuce leaves, in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Cover the mixture and chill for 4-6 hours.
3. Arrange lettuce leaves onto individual serving dishes.
4. Drain the salad and arrange it onto the lettuce leaves.
5. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
